name: trpg-desktop
description: 疯狂宅邸 — TRPG Agent 桌面应用

scripts.electron:dev: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE NODE_ENV=dev VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 npx electron .
scripts.electron:start: vite build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE npx electron .
scripts.dist: vite build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE npx electron-builder --linux AppImage --x64
